spec_match.rationale: Excellent representation of LLM token stream chunking, isolating the impact of head-of-line blocking on downstream consumers.

interactive.rationale: Superb interactivity, offering custom delay duration sliders, position selector dials, live scrolling dual-terminal streams, dynamic TTFT clocks, and a custom grid chunk dispatch timeline.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment with the parent blurb introducing the simulated AI chat use case.

edge_cases.rationale: Handles fast/zero-delay runs safely, manages async completion timers, and properly unlocks controls when tasks finish.

references.rationale: The page lists a ChromeStatus entry link, but the ID (5135016927215616) differs from the parent index.html listing ID (5111042975465472). They should be aligned.

design_system.rationale: Very polished design. Implements blink cursors, bold color highlights in dashboards, and clear hover shadow elevations on controls.

openQuestions.title: Align ChromeStatus reference ID
openQuestions.detail: The ChromeStatus link on line 198 references feature 5135016927215616, which is different from the parent index.html listing 5111042975465472. Update this to match the canonical parent milestone listing.
